Stormwood Battle Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 40
DMG: 26 Dmg Bonus: 142
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +4 DEX: +4 STA: +4
Effect: Shock of Flame (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 36
WT: 10.0 Size: LARGE
Class: WAR RNG MNK BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Stormwood Battle Staff
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2003 at 12:29 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254397219
1 post
Got this one for 150pp on Tholuxe Paells. I guess I lucked out

Bladescream 53 Human Ranger of Karana
Razzek 30 Iksar Monk of Cazic-Thule
▲ Page top
Proc and Stuff
QuoteReply
# Feb 24 2003 at 9:47 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758520398
7 posts
I bought this staff on the Rathe for 450 plat for my warrior. I consider that a steal for this weapon, and I will explain why.

First, it is a great ratio weapon. At 26/40 for its cost, it is faster than alot of 2h blunt weapons. The stats on it are nice, but the 96 point DD exxect that starts proc'in at level 36, was really nice. Considering I only have 110 Dex, I didn't think it would proc alot, as my other proc'in weapons don't, but this thing procs atleast 3 times a mob. That extra almmost 300 points of damage makes the fights go alot quicker. I give high marks for this weapon, and if you can get it cheap, more power to you. I however feel it is worth alot more than it is being sold for. My favorite weapon to date. This of course, is just my opinion. I know there are better weapons out there, not saying there isn't.
▲ Page top
this or brawl stick

# Sep 17 2002 at 10:36 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592251545095
18 posts
I am sure as hell glad I started playing on the Prexus server. I got one of these for my 31 monkie, hasn't proc'd but when I get lvl 36, I should proc a bit, with 131 dex. Oh, btw, I payed 150pp for this thing on Prexus. If anyone was wondering. Don't know why the inflation on the other servers though, maybe I should transfer servers and sell all my junk, I would make a killing!

Sorry, that's 139 dex :)

i picked one up today for the ever worthless now, rygorr battlemail, traded even, this'll do good in my monks hand alongside 1hb CoT and shaded staff ----rdy for battle. My 2cp worth anyway :)

▲ Page top
nice wepeon for monks wit Weight reduction bag
QuoteReply
# Feb 03 2002 at 1:16 PM Rating: Decent
sunol
Scholar
36 posts
at level 51, it is a 26/40 with 16 damage bonus weapon for a monk that procs for 96DD about once a fight with a DEX of 101. I still wield FB/COT for soloing and place this bad boy in a a katta bag (85% Weight Reduction) until grouped or going up against mobs with a damage shields. 10 stones is alot but in the bag I'm fine and right at 18 stones when wielding it nd putting my FB/COT in the bag

It consistantly does between 60 and 110 damage when my strength is unbuffed but takes too long to finsh of running mobs compared to my fb/cot combo. I picked it up for 500pp on Xev.

Edited, Mon Dec 24 02:38:55 2001
▲ Page top
Definitely a random drop
QuoteReply
# Jul 12 2001 at 7:03 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593965869700
Scholar
49 posts
Like the subject says, definitely a random drop. We picked it up off a froggy at the exit, and you could tell he was wielding it. I think that puts it into the same loot table as slime-coated harpoon. I don't remember it proc'ing during the fight, which is surprising, since most wielded weapons will.

The heavy weight makes it a bit challenging for a monk of this level to justify wielding it, since his fists do so much damage by this point. It's a great weapon for sale to lower-level monks, though.

Maladamuk Heartmender
Gnomish Vicar of the 52nd Ring
Storm's Justice
Karana Server
